name: Orange-Bourbon Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 Whole chicken breasts, Halved, boned, skinned (4 halves - 2 lbs total)
12 oz Frozen orange juice Concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a large heavy, oven-proof skillet, melt butter over medium heat until it begins to bubble but does not burn.
3. Coat chicken with salt and pepper.
4. Tuck the edges of the chicken under to form a compact shape about 1 1/2 inches thick.
5. Place the chicken in the skillet, skin side up.
6. Bake at 425°F for about 15 minutes, basting occasionally.
7. Remove almonds from skillet and toast until lightly browned.
8. Sprinkle toasted almonds with salt and let them cool to crisp.
9. Transfer chicken to warm serving plates.
10. Add orange juice concentrate to the drippings in the skillet; stir over high heat until reduced by one-third.
11. Stir in bourbon, then add remaining salt and pepper. Pour sauce over chicken.
12. Sprinkle with almonds and serve.
